summary: Successfully extracted 212 unique LinkedIn posts from 4 data sources. DuckDB shares provided 124 posts (highest volume), content library provided 3 (highest quality), voice library v2 provided 84 (filtered for 300+ chars), and paragraph chunks provided 1. Removed 231 duplicates using first-100-chars matching. Output saved to linkedin_posts_raw.jsonl with normalized text and comprehensive metadata.
learnings: DuckDB shares table contains escaped quotes and newlines that need normalization
Content library posts have highest quality with originality scores 5/5
Voice-library-v2 is mostly comments, need 300+ char filter for post-like content
Significant duplication across sources (231 removed) - deduplication essential
Average post length 797 chars, range 54-4093 chars shows good variety
broadcast: LinkedIn posts dataset has 212 entries. Highest quality source is content_library (curated). DuckDB shares has raw unformatted text with escaped newlines — handle \"\n\" as actual newlines.
